name: TC-NT-034
title: 11 yrs FT with related-corp 2-yr aggregation — total 13 yrs service
source: NT LSL Act 1981 s.12(6)/(7); TBD-NT-15 related-corp aggregation

expected._reconciliation_note: valueOfWeek reflects per-year sum / aggregated-payable-weeks; with related-corp boost, real elapsed years (11) yield per-year buckets but accrual normalises across aggregated 13-yr payable weeks → valueOfWeek smaller than currentWeeklyGross. Reconciliation item — see T9.3 surface.
